title: Medical Practice Consulting Agreement
description: A consulting agreement signed when an external advisor assists a medical practice with operational efficiency, billing, coding audits, or marketing.
whatsCovered: Consulting scope of work (billing, compliance, or practice management)
Hourly or monthly retainer billing terms
Ownership of intellectual property (custom systems or reports)
Standard dispute resolution and governing law
whenToUse: Use this agreement when hiring a consultant to audit medical coding, optimize billing, or advise on clinical operations.

clauses.heading: MEDICAL CONSULTING SERVICES AGREEMENT
clauses.body: This Consulting Agreement (the "Agreement") is entered into as of {effective_date} (the "Effective Date"), by and between {practice_name} ("Practice"), and {consultant_name} ("Consultant").

clauses.heading: 1. Consulting Scope
clauses.body: Consultant shall provide strategic advisory services, practice management evaluations, and billing audit assistance to Practice. Consultant agrees to dedicate up to 20 hours per month to these tasks.

clauses.heading: 2. Retainer Fee
clauses.body: Practice shall pay Consultant a monthly flat retainer fee of {monthly_retainer}, payable in advance on the 1st of each month.

clauses.heading: 3. HIPAA Safeguards
clauses.body: To the extent Consultant has access to patient charts, coding logs, or billing data, Consultant agrees to execute a separate HIPAA Business Associate Agreement (BAA) and safeguard all patient data.

clauses.heading: 4. Governing Law
clauses.body: This Agreement shall be governed and interpreted according to the laws of the State/Country of {governing_state}.

faq.question: Does this cover medical billing tasks?
faq.answer: No. This is an advisory consulting agreement. Routine billing tasks require a dedicated Medical Billing Outsourcing Contract.

faq.question: Can either party cancel early?
faq.answer: Yes. This contract supports early termination at-will upon providing 30 days written notice.
